text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while reviewing my schedule...
choice_data_list: (I have room for a nice, long break this month...)
(I have room for a nice, long break this month...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Tosen Jordan is riding a tidal wave of
momentum, having secured several wins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She no doubt deserves some rest, but I should be
thinking about how to best take advantage of
this...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Dude, just take a break.
choice_data_list: Giving it to me straight, huh.
Giving it to me straight, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, if you can take time off then take it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, what's there to worry about anyway? We
just have to both be off at the same time. Easy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Welp, here we are. Time to relax in the hot
springs.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, you won this trip yourself. You can't just not go.
choice_data_list: I thought you were gonna go with a friend...
I thought you were gonna go with a friend...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I tell you already? It'd be too awkward. I
love all my friends too much to choose just one of
them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But if you and me go together, everyone'll
understand. I'll just tell them it was to loosen up
my muscles for running or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I wanna get in the water right away.
Let's hurry up and go inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... That was to die for.
choice_data_list: Looks like you had a nice time too.
Looks like you had a nice time too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Of course. We came all the way here, gotta make
the most of it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they have table tennis. Can you play,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha, then let's play. Loser has to buy juice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan approaches the table... and the
match is on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack... Clack!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Where're you going?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hit the ball, aiming for the rightside edge of the
table... opposite of Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Crap! Gotta get over there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she is an Umamusume, after all. Tosen Jordan
reacts quickly, reaching out with her right hand,
and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What the?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The ball cracks open with a loud burst.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, man! I totally would've won if that worked!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, now I'm hot... I'm gonna get in the hot
spring again.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Can I get you the juice after?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cool.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
By the way, no using your phone while I'm gone,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Because you're not supposed to be working.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anything else is fine. Play a game or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even afterwards, Tosen Jordan hangs out in my
room instead of going back to her own.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what even is this show? I don't know any of
the actors. Hilarious. It's boring, though.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I guess it doesn't really matter, does it? As long
as we have something to watch.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, doesn't this kinda feel like hanging out at
your grandma's house on summer vacation?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, you just go 'cause you gotta, and it's not
like there's anything fun to do, but somehow you
still kinda have a good time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
In the moment, it's so boring you could cry tears
of happiness when you get to go home.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But then, way later...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You remember how nice the breeze felt when you
opened the screen doors at Grandma's house...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And then... you just get taken back to that day a
million years ago when you visited.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I feel like... I dunno, like that day I spent there
has always lived on here inside of me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And I think someday, that's how I'll remember
today too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan opens the window. A warm, gentle
breeze caresses my face.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You better remember it too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Tosen Jordan and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
